description: Action items whose title or summary matches one of these patterns are flagged `restricted=true` at extract time. Self-execution of a restricted item requires an approval-gate pass (operator confirmation or sudo override). This is Compliance-2 from the meeting-facilitator outcome simulation: stop AI from auto-running 'send the contract to legal' or 'wire money to vendor X' on the strength of a transcript alone.

rules.label: Financial transfer / payment / wire
rules.rationale: Money movement requires a human pass.

rules.label: Contract / NDA / legal binding
rules.rationale: Bindings should not be auto-executed from a meeting transcript.

rules.label: Personnel actions (hire / fire / promotion / discipline)
patterns: 採用|解雇|降格|昇格|懲戒
rules.rationale: Personnel actions need HR + manager review.

rules.label: Regulatory / compliance notification
patterns: 監督当局|金融庁|証券取引等監視委員会

rules.label: Production deployment / rollback
patterns: 本番(リリース|デプロイ|ロールバック)
rules.rationale: Production changes need a deploy gate.

rules.label: External press / customer-wide communication
patterns: 全顧客|プレスリリース|公表
rules.rationale: Mass external communication needs PR review.
